title: [Bug]: The results of the complex query are unexpected.
description: <!-- A clear and concise description of bug. -->
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 FLOAT , c1 VARCHAR(123) , c2 INT )  PARTITION BY KEY (c1) WITH COLUMN GROUP (all columns, each column);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1 LIKE t0;

Insert statements for table t1
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES
(0.221074, '', -1741523580),
(0.79028, 'yH#-5.DU', -1964321858);

SELECT /*+ USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t0) USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t1) */ ALL true
FROM t0
         RIGHT OUTER JOIN t1 ON (t0.c0) >= (t1.c0)
WHERE (CAST(t0.c0 AS DATE)) IS NULL;

SELECT /*+ USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t0) USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t1) */ ALL true
    -> FROM t0
    ->          RIGHT OUTER JOIN t1 ON (t0.c0) >= (t1.c0)
    -> WHERE (CAST(t0.c0 AS DATE)) IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Unexpected results from RIGHT OUTER JOIN with NULL date cast
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL), (2, 'example', '2023-01-01'), (3, NULL, '2023-01-02');
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
SELECT /*+ USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t0) USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t1) */ ALL true FROM t0 RIGHT OUTER JOIN t1 ON (CAST(t0.c0 AS DATE)) < (t1.c0);
